# Hooman Finder

> Hooman Finder is a free dog-adoption discovery tool that helps people find currently adoptable shelter and rescue dogs whose published profiles may fit their lifestyle.

## Important public routes

- [Home](https://hoomanfinder.com/): Overview and entry points to matching and browsing.
- [Browse adoptable dogs](https://hoomanfinder.com/dogs): Current public dog listings.
- [Dog matching quiz](https://hoomanfinder.com/quiz): Lifestyle and preference questionnaire.
- [About Hooman Finder](https://hoomanfinder.com/about): How the service works.
- [Contact](https://hoomanfinder.com/contact): Contact information.
- [Privacy](https://hoomanfinder.com/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://hoomanfinder.com/terms): Terms of use.

## Important context

- Match results are guidance and are not a guarantee of compatibility, temperament, health, behavior, availability, or adoption.
- Shelters and rescues control counseling, applications, meet-and-greets, eligibility requirements, and final adoption decisions.
- Listing details come from participating shelters and rescues and are primarily synchronized from RescueGroups.org. Hooman Finder links people to the original source listing for current details and next steps.

## Sitemaps

- [Main sitemap](https://hoomanfinder.com/sitemap.xml): Public site routes and canonical adoptable-dog profiles.
- [Dog sitemap](https://hoomanfinder.com/dog-sitemap.xml): Canonical profiles for currently public, adoptable dogs.

## Contact

- Email: info@hoomanfinder.com
